'''thajuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycolyl|mycolyl]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycolyl|mycolyl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thajuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæjiwith|thæjiwith]] || [[word:thæjiwij|thæjiwij]] || [[word:thæjiwish|thæjiwish]] || [[word:thæjiwi|thæjiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thajujuwuth|thajujuwuth]] || [[word:thajujuwuj|thajujuwuj]] || [[word:thajujuwush|thajujuwush]] || [[word:thajujuwu|thajujuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajuwuth|thajuwuth]] || [[word:thajuwuj|thajuwuj]] || [[word:thajuwush|thajuwush]] || [[word:thajuwu|thajuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajufwufth|thajufwufth]] || [[word:thajufwufj|thajufwufj]] || [[word:thajufwufsh|thajufwufsh]] || [[word:thajufwuf|thajufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thajuwuthu|thajuwuthu]] || [[word:thajuwuju|thajuwuju]] || [[word:thajuwushu|thajuwushu]] || [[word:thajuwuku|thajuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thajuwuth|thajuwuth]] || [[word:thajuwuj|thajuwuj]] || [[word:thajuwush|thajuwush]] || [[word:thajuwu|thajuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thajuwuthul|thajuwuthul]] || [[word:thajuwujul|thajuwujul]] || [[word:thajuwushul|thajuwushul]] || [[word:thajuwukul|thajuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thajuwuuthuthu|thajuwuuthuthu]] || [[word:thajuwuujuju|thajuwuujuju]] || [[word:thajuwuushushu|thajuwuushushu]] || [[word:thajuwuuku|thajuwuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thajuwuthun|thajuwuthun]] || [[word:thajuwujun|thajuwujun]] || [[word:thajuwushun|thajuwushun]] || [[word:thajuwukun|thajuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thajuwuthuoro|thajuwuthuoro]] || [[word:thajuwujuoro|thajuwujuoro]] || [[word:thajuwushuoro|thajuwushuoro]] || [[word:thajuwukuoro|thajuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
